summary: 7/7 unit tests PASS for computeCoverage; all SPEC-required AC cases covered; collect-coverage exits 0; 1 WARN (stale traceability paths), 2 INFO.

findings.claim: TRACEABILITY.md R2/R3 Code column references e2e/coverage/ but files are at e2e/report/
findings.evidence: R2 Code column: 'juggler-frontend/e2e/coverage/ui-coverage.js'; actual path confirmed: juggler-frontend/e2e/report/ui-coverage.js
findings.fix: Update TRACEABILITY.md R2/R3 Code column from e2e/coverage/ to e2e/report/ — done in this leg

findings.claim: idsOf() throws on a map entry with a missing or non-string id; this error path has no test
findings.evidence: Line 39-44: throws Error('ui-map entry missing string id: ...') when entry.id is absent or not a string; no test exercises this path
findings.fix: Add test: computeCoverage({ screens: [{ name: 'no-id' }], modals: [], paths: [] }, []) should throw with message containing 'missing string id'

findings.claim: COVERS_RE is a module-level /g regex reused across file reads; works correctly now but is a latent bug if the while loop is ever broken out of early
findings.evidence: Line 37: const COVERS_RE = /@covers.../g at module scope; used in while(exec) loop across multiple files — lastIndex resets on null return but not on early break
findings.fix: Move COVERS_RE definition inside collectCoveredIds() to make it local and eliminate the global-state risk
